entry.title: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Wednesday, March 5th in Kolkata, India 🇮🇳 from 9:00 to 16:00 IST. The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructor is Developer Advocate Nora von Thenen from SAP.

The event is kindly being hosted by Capgemini Technology Services India Ltd. , thank you! Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 30 attendees. 

Location : Capgemini Technology Services India Limited (Candor Tech Space), Candor Tech SpaceIT/ITES SEZ, Tower A3 -1st to 4th Floor, Tower A2 – 1st Floor to 2nd Floor, Tower A1 1st Floor to 3rd Floor, Action Area -1D, Block No -DH, Newtown, Rajarhat, Kolkata, West Bengal - 700156

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: TrendData_SysOverallPerformance not allowing multiple user
entry.content:
I am trying to get multiple userID's data together from TrendData_SysOverallPerformance odata api for Sucessfactors

when ever i give one more userid as filter it throws below error

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" standalone="yes"?><error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata"><code>COE_GENERAL_FORBIDDEN</code><message lang="en-US">[COE0020]target user id should not be null</message></error>

I have around 4500 users to update the data, reading one by one user is not possible , how to tackle this situvation.

Thanks,

Sreenith

It doesn't seem you are calling via the destination. My colleague @nicoschoenteich did a 2-minute series on UI5, including this video how he set up access to external API using destination via approuter and to test locally.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MHJzIz7iiHs&list=PL6RpkC85SLQC4kuj22e4hw85Sa1pClD8y&index=4

entry.title: Re: Highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Release
entry.content:
@Harish_Mangtani,

Thank you for the followup information.  Just to be clear, I would like to confirm the following points from the references you've provided:

  • Classic ABAP add-ons can be certified and/or re-certified against SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, only until Q3, 2025, right?
  • The Add-On Deployment Certification for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition document states that Third-party Add-Ons implemented in “standard” ABAP, that conform to SAP standards and conventions for ABAP packaging and deployment, are eligible for certification within the SAP integration certification program.  In this context, does "standard ABAP" refer to Classic ABAP or ABAP Cloud?

entry.title: Tax depreciation key not calculating ½ month depreciation
entry.content:
Requirement:

We need a US Bonus Tax depreciation key which calculates ½ month depreciation for the first month and calculates depreciation based on life (straight line method) on 40% of the value.

Issue:

40% of the value is correctly calculating, however ½ of depreciation for the first month is not calculating.

Config so far:

New Depn key ZL40 created and Period control 012 assigned with multi-level ZL4 assigned.

For Period control method 012, SAP standard key 002 has been assigned to calculate for ½ month, however this is not happening.

Config screens from DEV system:

Period control: 012

 

 

Following are the results from our TEST system based on the above config.

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA

entry.title: Re: Consuming external services(Odata/Rest) using destinations configured in BTP cockpit.
entry.content:
Hi ervins_gleizds,

These are few of my observations.

1. Please add properties WebIdeUsage and WebIDESystem to destinations configurations.

2. Also, since you are using service which is authenticated, you will need to update configurations in xs-app.json accordingly.
"authenticationType": "xsuaa", "csrfProtection": false

3. Verify if the service url is correct. Try to ping the service URL in browser/POSTMAN: equipmentUpdate/http/equipment/DEV : Replace the equipmentUpdate in this URL with URL maintained in destination.

Let me know if it works out for you.

entry.title: Required default permission as execute in OS level for files generating from Application side
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

 

We have developed a custom program which is generating few files at OS level with default read/write (-rw-rw----) permissions and later those files are picked by CPI interface (Cloud platform integration) via cloud connector.

 

We are using cloud connector as a middleware between CPI and on premise ECC system and all the connections are working fine with a generic user which we have created for SFTP from CPI to ECC system.

 

Currently we are facing issue where SFTP user is not able to execute the files placed in OS directory from CPI end as those are generating with read/write permissions and we have to manually provide execute permission to execute the entire workflow.

 

Is there any way where we can provide by default execute permission (775 or 755) to newly generated files whenever the program is running and the files will be generated with execute permission so that SFTP user can perform the necessary action to complete the workflow.

 

Currently we have a workaround where we have setup a cronjob at OS end at interval of 30 mins which is providing 775 permission to all files generating inside the source directory so that SFTP user can perform execute action on those.

 

Please assist if there is any possible way where we can restrict the files at OS end to generate with default 775 or 755 permission.

 

 

 

Regards,

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Required default permission as execute in OS level fo...
entry.content:
To ensure that newly generated files have the desired permissions (775 or 755) by default, you can use several approaches. Here are a few methods you can consider:

1. Modify the Program to Set Permissions

If you have control over the custom program that generates the files, you can modify it to set the desired permissions when creating the files. In most programming languages, there are functions or methods to set file permissions.

For example, in Python, you can use os.chmod to set the file permissions:

import os

# Create the file
file_path = 'path/to/your/file'
with open(file_path, 'w') as file:
    file.write('Your content here')

# Set the file permissions to 755
os.chmod(file_path, 0o755)

2. Use umask to Set Default Permissions

The umask command in Unix-like operating systems can be used to set default file creation permissions. You can set the umask value in the shell or script that runs your program.

For example, to set the default permissions to 775, you can set the umask to 002:

umask 002

To set the default permissions to 755, you can set the umask to 022:

umask 022

You can add this umask command to the script that runs your program or to the shell profile (e.g., .bashrc or .profile) of the user running the program.

3. Use chmod in a Post-Processing Script

If modifying the program or using umask is not feasible, you can create a post-processing script that changes the permissions of the files immediately after they are created. This script can be triggered by the program itself or run as a cron job with a shorter interval.

For example, you can create a script set_permissions.sh:

#!/bin/bash
# Directory where files are generated
DIR="/path/to/your/directory"

# Change permissions of all files in the directory to 755
chmod 755 $DIR/*

You can then run this script immediately after your program finishes generating the files.

4. Use inotify to Monitor and Change Permissions

On Linux systems, you can use inotify to monitor the directory for new files and change their permissions as soon as they are created. This approach is more efficient than using a cron job.

You can use a tool like inotifywait from the inotify-tools package:

#!/bin/bash
# Directory to monitor
DIR="/path/to/your/directory"

# Monitor the directory for new files and change their permissions
inotifywait -m -e create "$DIR" | while read path action file; do
    chmod 755 "$DIR/$file"
done

Summary

  • Modify the program to set the desired permissions when creating files.
  • Use umask to set default file creation permissions.
  • Use a post-processing script to change permissions immediately after file creation.
  • Use inotify to monitor the directory and change permissions in real-time.

Choose the method that best fits your environment and constraints.

entry.title: Re: My First Experience with LeanIX: A Newcomer’s Guide to EA Modeling After getting Certification
entry.content:
Hi Hemant,

Apart from what @JansiMurugesan mentioned, you can follow below links too to have more understanding about S/4HANA transformation from your ECC system

https://www.leanix.net/en/wiki/tech-transformation/sap-s4hana-transformation

https://www.leanix.net/en/enterprise-architecture/integrations#signavio -->Integration with Signavio helps too for process mapping.

With CLOUD ALM too --https://docs-eam.leanix.net/docs/sap-cloud-alm-integration-for-managing-projects 

On top of above standard links, it does have various diagrams & reports which can help for your current landscape.

entry.title: Re-Allocated Issue at Good Inventory transfer request
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

In inventory transfer request, when a batch number is allocated and it is sent for approval, the batch number is automatically de-allocated
 
 Following is the issue reproduce steps.

  1. Add Inventory Transfer Request Document

    • Assign the batch (Batch.2).

  2. Approval by Approver

    • The approver will review and approve the document.

  3. Draft Review by Originator

    • The originator will reopen the draft and add a remark.

  4. Second Approval by Approver

    • The approver will approve the document again.

  5. Draft Update by Originator

    • The originator will update the draft.

  6. Issue: Check Batch Allocation

    • After the draft is updated, the batch allocation is getting removed.
 
 
 
Regards,
Krishna Varma

entry.title: Re: Not able to login SAP
entry.content:
Hi Underdog

Format of server name in screenshot is incorrect.

It should be like : https://SLD server name 

In your case, it will be https://WIN-4OT59U0VIU6

Please enter it and then  check login.

Kind Regards

Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Re: Ariba Contracts Integration with Fieldglass via Open...
entry.content:
I Yayati,

Pls excuse my parent/child comment and this issue has nothing to do with CIG.

Let me provide more details on the situation. I believe someone who has worked with this specific scenario might be able to provide insight:

- We are creating CW at the parent level and Contract Compliance at the child level in Ariba.
- FG is calling the parent endpoint to fetch CW and the child endpoint to fetch Contract Compliance. Please note that the realm details are included in these endpoints.
- According to FG team's analysis, the realm IDs in the endpoints are different, which is preventing the FG system from reprocessing the data. Both endpoints should have the same realm ID. However, we cannot use the same realm ID, since CW is at the parent level and compliance is at the child level. Hence the question here is, do we have any such restriction with integration - FG cannot reprocess the data if ariba has parent/child setup.
If anyone has worked with a similar multi-realm setup, their input would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Attach File with CBO in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Jerry,

Thanks for the reply, I already exposed the CBO as OData in Business Applicaiton Studio and created a custom Fiori app there. My requirement is to save the attachments.

Regards,

Iftikhar Ali

entry.title: Re: Custom Theme for Icon Tab Bar
entry.content:
tl;dr: a) use an application preview with your own URL; b) use a preview that accidentally contains tabs (e.g. "Object Header" or "Shell"); c) a dedicated "Tab" preview is in development.

Hi @aditi01!

In the past, the IconTabBar was a bit of a poor cousin, in that there were no parameters dedicated to tab bars. Only mid December '24 we added the sapTab_ namespace with parameters for tab bars. To my knowledge, these are not yet consumed by any tab-like control of any UI technology. And as we try to have one preview per namespace, and only if parameters are actually used in that preview, we do not yet have a preview for tabs. We'll build one as soon as the IconTabBar uses the new parameters.

We do however have previews that contain tab-like controls: "Object Header" and "Shell" from the "SAPUI5 Controls" preview collection, as well as "Launchpad", "List Report", "Object Page" and "Worklist" from "SAPUI5 Applications". While they might not be ideal and won't showcase IconTabBars in all their glory, you should at least get a glimpse of what your theme does to IconTabBars.

Last but not least, you can always add your own application preview with just a URL. For SAPUI5, this application has to be hosted under the same origin as the theme designer – e.g. on CF behind the same approuter, on ABAP in the same system. If you were able to proxy the sap.m.IconTabBar samples on the same origin, you could register that as an application preview and draw on abundant resources.

Let me know if that works for you.

Best
Dominik
SAP Development Support
UI Technologies | UI theme designer

entry.title: Re: The description field does not display any content.
entry.content:
Hi kamal_reda

Please check below mentioned notes about similar issue:

2376555 - Product Description Field is Disabled in Bill of Materials and Production Orders (FVC)
2766524 - Change of Item Description Is Not Reflected in Bill of Materials' (Fixed in 10.0 PL00)
2595904 - Product Description Field in BoM Master Data Is Enabled (FAQ)
2872529 - Item and Resource Descriptions Are Editable in Bill of Materials and Production Order Components (Fixed in 10.0 PL01)

Hope it helps.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: VAR case forwarding via SAP Cloud ALM ITSM API
entry.content:
Hi,

For ServiceNow, there will be an out-of-the-box solution from STA Technologies (https://sta-technologies.com/). It is scheduled to be published in February, it will be certified by ServiceNow and will be available on the ServiceNow Store.

If you want to be notified about it, I'd suggest subscribing to our LinkedIn newsletter (https://www.linkedin.com/newsletters/innovative-add-ons-for-sap-6927585443106430977/) and following me (https://www.linkedin.com/in/tamasholics/).

Here is a screenshot as a teaser:

 

Cheers,

Tamás

entry.title: Re: Al abrir una cotización, pedido o factura hay que act...
entry.content:
Hi,

Usually this happens due to some customization, FMS on header or rows which gets activated on opening the document or additional code in the SP_TransactionNotification or SP_PostTransactionNotice.

Try to re-check all the customization again and also stop the add-ons connected(if any) and check the results.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: User should not be able to delete the fact data from...
entry.content:
Hi @saikhancs35,

Unfortunately for now there is no option available to separate planning activities from deleting fact data. You rightfully stated, these are bound to the maintain rights in the security role for a certain model.

In case you want to get this accelerated, please support one of the open influence requests.

Thanks,
Thomas

entry.title: Eclipse(HANA Development): Error when searching for a table in aProjection Node of a Graphical View
entry.content:
I have Eclipse Version: 2024-12 (4.34.0) with the latest SAP Development tools installed

I want to create a Calculation View and add a table to a Projection Node, but whenever I search for the table name, I get the following error. How can I fix this?

Here is the full error log

eclipse.buildId=4.34.0.20241128-0756
java.version=21.0.5
java.vendor=Eclipse Adoptium
BootLoader constants: OS=win32, ARCH=x86_64, WS=win32, NL=en_US
Framework arguments:  -product org.eclipse.epp.package.java.product
Command-line arguments:  -os win32 -ws win32 -arch x86_64 -product org.eclipse.epp.package.java.product

org.eclipse.core.jobs
Error
Tue Jan 28 14:19:21 EET 2025
An internal error occurred during: "Items filtering".

java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError: Could not initialize class org.apache.http.conn.ssl.SSLConnectionSocketFactory
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.http.internal.ssl.SSLSocketFactoryProvider.createSSLSocketFactory(SSLSocketFactoryProvider.java:58)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.http.internal.HttpFactory.createSocketFactory(HttpFactory.java:107)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.http.internal.HttpFactory.createHttpClient(HttpFactory.java:82)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.http.internal.client.HttpClient.initialize(HttpClient.java:104)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.http.internal.client.HttpClient.<init>(HttpClient.java:90)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.http.internal.client.HttpClientManager.createHttpClient(HttpClientManager.java:52)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.http.internal.client.HttpClientManager.getClient(HttpClientManager.java:75)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.http.internal.client.HttpClientManager.getClient(HttpClientManager.java:1)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.service.common.core.ServiceCommonRequestExecutor.execute(ServiceCommonRequestExecutor.java:36)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.service.common.deliveryunit.api.impl.DeliveryUnitVersion.createDeliveryUnitsDetailedVersion(DeliveryUnitVersion.java:265)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.service.common.deliveryunit.api.impl.DeliveryUnitVersion.getDeliveryUnitDetailedVersion(DeliveryUnitVersion.java:141)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.service.common.deliveryunit.api.impl.DeliveryUnitVersion.isDeliveryUnitVersionSupported(DeliveryUnitVersion.java:100)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.service.common.version.api.impl.ServiceVersion.isServiceVersionSupported(ServiceVersion.java:49)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.service.common.metadata.search.api.impl.MetadataSearch.search(MetadataSearch.java:122)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.bi.search.provider.DALBasedSearchProvider.doSearch(DALBasedSearchProvider.java:162)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.bi.search.engine.SearchEngine.doSearch(SearchEngine.java:197)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.bi.search.engine.SearchEngine.doBasicSearch(SearchEngine.java:164)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.bi.search.engine.SearchAPI.doBasicSearch(SearchAPI.java:106)
    at com.sap.ndb.studio.bi.search.ui.view.FindModelingObjectDialogue.fillContentProvider(FindModelingObjectDialogue.java:714)
    at org.eclipse.ui.dialogs.FilteredItemsSelectionDialog$FilterJob.filterContent(FilteredItemsSelectionDialog.java:1954)
    at org.eclipse.ui.dialogs.FilteredItemsSelectionDialog$FilterJob.internalRun(FilteredItemsSelectionDialog.java:1909)
    at org.eclipse.ui.dialogs.FilteredItemsSelectionDialog$FilterJob.doRun(FilteredItemsSelectionDialog.java:1889)
    at org.eclipse.ui.dialogs.FilteredItemsSelectionDialog$FilterJob.run(FilteredItemsSelectionDialog.java:1877)
    at org.eclipse.core.internal.jobs.Worker.run(Worker.java:63)
Caused by: java.lang.ExceptionInInitializerError: Exception java.lang.ExceptionInInitializerError [in thread "Worker-143: Items filtering"]
    at org.apache.http.conn.ssl.SSLConnectionSocketFactory.<clinit>(SSLConnectionSocketFactory.java:151)
    ... 24 more

entry.title: Re: Step by Step for Implementing Idempotent Process Call [ SAP Cloud Integration ]
entry.content:
Hello All,

I tried the same scenario but you need to use ${property.CamelDuplicateMessage} = 'true' as the value of flag is coming on property instead of header level.

Thanks,

Ronak

entry.title: No object definition exists for customizing object V_FINSC_VAR
entry.content:
while I am assigning fiscal year to company code, I am getting above error message, Please let me know if one knows. 

Message No. TK427

Diagnosis

The Customizing object R3TR VDAT V_FINSC_VAR is not defined in the tables of the Change and Transport System.

This means that you cannot use the Transport Organizer to edit it.

System Response

The function terminates.

Procedure

First check whether the name of the object is correct. Then you (or the system administrator) should check the object definition, to ensure that the object was created correctly (transaction SOBJ).

If the object does not exist, then create it or delete it from the request/task.

entry.title: Disabling the Mobile App for Multiple Profiles
entry.content:
Hi,Regarding this information in the link below, is it possible to disabling function to log in to many profile in the mobile app?

Enabling the Mobile App for Multiple Profiles | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Error. 1989457
entry.content: Hello This note that was referred in that screenshot doesn't give any rsolution can any one please give us a working solution?

entry.title: Re: BRS (Bank Reconciliation Statement)
entry.content:
Hi Sai Kumar, 
@sai_kumar 

I'm afraid I cannot help you solve the problem you're facing. However, I really recommend you to start using processing rules instead of posting rules! Processing rules are the successor functionality of the posting rules and are more precise. You can create and edit (and even automate) processing rules in the Manage Processing Rules app in your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system. 
Processing rules mainly consist of conditions and actions, and determine exactly how a bank statement item must be posted. They determine which accounts are posted to on debit and credit sides, and also whether or not the respective debit or credit side is cleared.

For more detailed information, see the following help links and their subordinated pages: 

  • Overview on Automatic Bank Statement Processing 
  • Manage Processing Rules - For Bank Statements
  • Processing Rules

I hope that this information helps you further. And hopefully another product expert can have a look at the problem you have decribed. 🙃

Best regards,

Anita

entry.title: Re: Table/FM to get change log of configured material cha...
entry.content: Hi @DominikTylczyn , Thanks for your reply. I tried these tables and other FM's as well but it's not showing change history for VC

entry.title: Re: SAC - Linked Analysis - Input Controls and Widgets
entry.content:
Hi @mtayibi 
As of now, Linked Analysis in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) only works between widgets (e.g., tables and charts)

but there is a alternate to this solution you can use onselect event of widget and use setSelectedKey to set input value of selected values of chart.

let me know if you need further information

entry.title: Re: SAC - Linked Analysis - Input Controls and Widgets
entry.content:
Hi @mtayibi 
As of now, Linked Analysis in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) only works between widgets (e.g., tables and charts)

but there is a alternate to this solution you can use onselect event of widget and use setSelectedKey of inputcontrol to set input value of selected values of chart.

let me know if you need further information

entry.title: Issue getting DMS Folder Content in SAP Build Process Automation - Undefined DMS Destination
entry.content:
Hi

I am trying to get the DMS Folder Content using the SAP provided activity "get DMS Folder Content", but I keep getting this error

The file Is uploaded using File Upload in SBPA Form, so initial DMS Destination is already set. I am using this activity to get the folder content

In the folder path, I am passing the hash number which I received after uploading the file. Is this the correct value? Also what specific destination we need to use the DMS Related Activities? 

The documentation does not have any details around these. Appreciate if someone can help. 

Thanks

Sandip

entry.title: Re: SAC Compass - any instructions available?
entry.content: Example Task: Create Your First Simulation

entry.title: Re: How to write in ClassificationClass.classificationAtt...
entry.content:
The attribute classificationAttributes is defined with Jalo persistence, so how it is retrieved can be found in the Jalo class de.hybris.platform.catalog.jalo.classification.ClassificationClass.

In the Jalo class, the getClassificationAttributes() method calls getClassificationAttributeAssignments(), which adds ClassificationAttribute objects from ClassAttributeAssignments to a list and returns it. The getClassificationAttributeAssignments() method, in turn, calls getDeclaredClassificationAttributeAssignments() for the ClassificationClass and its supercategories of type ClassificationClass.

When you check the getDeclaredClassificationAttributeAssignments() method, you'll see the following FlexibleSearch query:

SELECT {PK} FROM FROM {ClassAttributeAssignment} 
WHERE {classificationClass}= ?me 
ORDER BY {position} ASC, {creationtime} ASC

Therefore, you should create ClassAttributeAssignment records for the ClassificationClass and ClassificationAttribute. After doing so, you should see classificationAttributes populated in Backoffice..

entry.title: Crystal Reports 13.0.37 crash in dtsagent.dll
entry.content:
Hello,

My application crash with a call stack like this. I use .NET Framework 4.8.

I uploaded a memory dump at the following address.

https://cloud.sdg.ro/index.php/s/YcZLxr7jHyGyt2q

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Datasphere replication flow Initial load in progress...
entry.content: Same here...we are also getting for only some replication flows..there is a note which seems to point to authorizations..trying to see what happens https://me.sap.com/notes/3553846/E

entry.title: Re: BRS (Bank Reconciliation Statement)
entry.content:
Hi Anita_Ahmadpour

@Anita_Ahmadpour 

After doing R&D I came up with the solution that in configuration level I provide same masked g/l for the both checkIn (21010010) and Bank Transfer Incoming (11010010)

In Make Global Settings for Electronic Bank Statement configuration where I provide same masked g/l for the both checkIN and Bank Transfer Incoming.

By doing the above configuration system pickking the correct g/l.

Please correct me if i am wrong.

entry.title: Re: CDS view with Change Data Capture(CDC) for Replication Flow – Part 1
entry.content:
Thanks @Cocquerel , exactly that's a very complex architecture. Another alternative we are evaluating is to expose ODQ (Deltas) via OData but this leads to a "pull" (vs push/event) architecture and requires a middleware (BTP CI) to pull from OData before pushing to AEM. 

Anyhow, we will keep reviewing but it seems that we will be forced to use Datasphere to be able to get event driven access to CDS delta changes ... 😕 (ie we would need "the jungle" in order to get "a banana")

entry.title: Re: Can I give my own order number to a hybris order or s...
entry.content:
My suggestion would be to store the order code from the external system in a separate column (e.g., externalOrderCode) and search using this column in FlexibleSearch when needed. Additionally, you should add an index to improve the query's performance.

Updating the code attribute of an Order is acceptable as long as it does not conflict with the order code number series. 

I assume you are using the standard flow since you mentioned v2 web services. In the standard flow, where you create a cart, add products to the cart, and place an order, SAP Commerce generates two codes: one for the cart and one for the order. While you can update the code attribute after order creation with the external ID, I believe generating two codes in this scenario is unnecessary. To avoid this, I would customize DefaultCartFactory and DefaultCreateOrderFromCartStrategy to prevent code generation when the cart and order are created by an external system.

Hope this helps,

entry.title: Re: SAP PaPM Cloud Universal Model - Model View: Hierarchy Functionalities
entry.content: Can you help further on How to represent these hierarchy in PaPM UM reports ?

entry.title: Re: Wrong conversion of amount to condition value in Purc...
entry.content: Hi Sandeep, that turned out to be the root cause of our problem. We deactivated it, had to rewrite certain select statements and then the issue was solved. Thank you for your feedback!

entry.title: Re: BRS (Bank Reconciliation Statement)
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Disabling the Mobile App for Multiple Profiles
entry.content:
"The 'Multiple Profile' feature is part of the SuccessFactors Mobile Application.

It can be enabled or disabled at the SuccessFactors App level. (Go to Settings > Multiple Profiles)

 

The 'Multiple Profile' feature itself is not possible to remove as it is hard-coded at the app level."

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Update Child entity from Parent entity with Action
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Is it possible to change the child entity with an action from the parent entity? Creating a new child entity works, but changing an existing one causes me problems.

Here is my EML:

MODIFY ENTITIES OF c_parent_entity IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY child_entity
          UPDATE FIELDS ( status )
             WITH VALUE #( FOR key IN keys
                         ( %tky       = key-%tky
                           status = task_status-closed ) )
        MAPPED mapped
        FAILED failed
        REPORTED reported.

 It doesn't seem to work that way.

 

regards,

Lars

entry.title: Re: Chart Display Issues with SAP BW Live Queries in SAC
entry.content:
Hi @mario_panzenboeck 

as measures are in Rows (Lumira) but Columns (SAC). you can use scripting to make them as you have done in lumira.

Has anyone here better screenshots please ?

entry.title: We want to know what client trigger the business rule
entry.content:
I have the business rule  and it has in the log a parameter "Client" that for example has the value fsm-connector

Is there any way to get this value in the business rule to use as a condition? I have searched and have not found any option.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: We want to know what client trigger the business rule
entry.content:
Yes, you can make use of the special variable to check the client. 

Please use the variable ${client.id} in order to check the client. Please also refer to the documentation: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_integration_guidelines/best-practices.html#if-useful-skip-executions-based-on-clientid

The documentation also shares best practices.

entry.title: Re: FS Items and GL Account Mapping Table into SAC
entry.content:
Hi @sachinagarwal_680 

you can create GL Dimension and create custom hierarchy  for FS item  and map those GLs to those nodes

entry.title: Re: Table/FM to get change log of configured material cha...
entry.content:
Hello @Suryansh_jain 

The change documents are read with the IBCD_GET_CD_CONFIGURATION  function. Eventually the function pulls the change documents from CDHDR, CDPOS tables. The change object is IBINVALUES. You need to call the function with configuration instance number.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Communicate from SAP Public Cloud to Java Application...
entry.content:
Hi @andrzej_rosinski, 

As you have now added more details about the JCoServer, in particular, that you are not using TLS, explains it. To my knowledge, plain communication is not allowed for WebSocket RFC from Steampunk systems.  Simply try with a simple certificate and import the CA of it as trusted in the Steampunk system 

Best regards
Markus

entry.title: Re: SAC Compass - any instructions available?
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: SAC Compass - any instructions available?
entry.content: Hi, great thank you! It is possible to change the versions in the help site, I didn't knew that. Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: ME21N Document overview within the Selection variant
entry.content: Please provide more information. What for do you need those variants? What is not right with the system behaviour you observe right now?

entry.title: How to link 2 Analysis for Office reports stored in BO Platform avoiding Launchpad Login
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I have 2 Analysis for Office reports stored in the SAP BO Platform: Report1 and Report2

The idea is to have a link in Report1, and when you click on it, Report2 is open. So I went to Report2 and obtained its OpenDoc link.

In Report1, I pasted this link to be able to call Report2.

But I noticed that after clicking on link in Report1, the Launchpad login opens, forcing me login there (when I was already logged in Analysis for Office)

Do you know how could I avoid this Launchpad "relogging"?

Thanksss!

Victor

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP Create button for child entity on Object Page
entry.content: Hi @Shivaraj_Gowda, sorry for the late reply. As of now, the Fiori Elements for RAP only supports Deep Creation ( Sub Object creation ) only in Fiori Elements V4 + Draft, therefore the requirement is only realisable with OData V4 Service + Draft.

entry.title: Re: SAC Compass - any instructions available?
entry.content: Yes you can do that under title of the page

entry.title: MDG functionality has a navigation issue when clicking on any change request
entry.content:
Hi Experts, in MDG S4,it is observed that in MDG functionality has a navigation issue when clicking on any change request, it opens Business partner search page , whereas it should give a detailed view of Change request. Please suggest the solution for this.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: RAP Unmanaged Scenario - Creation of RAP BO does not...
entry.content: Hi, just for clarification - I was the user that opened the SAP note, so just to confirm - this was a program error, and continues to be a program error in I_EquipmentTP. SAP themselves, as mentioned in the note suggest to use A_Equipment, which is unreleased for cloud RAP Object - actually the RAP object standing behind API_Equipment Web API to process equipments. I would like to leave this for other developers that found the same issue.

entry.title: Re: Modify Scope in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Jwangman,

In the copy you have created, make sure you select the appropriate Process Hierarchy Nodes in the Relations tab. Make sure also that the copy is published.

Then, in the scope of the project, make sure you select Custom also in the Solution Scenarios.

By doing this, I was able to select the custom process (copy of standard) in the project.

Let me know if you need further details.

entry.title: Difference between “Assigned Restriction Types” and “Permission Filters” for Key Figure Authorizatio
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a question about setting permissions in SAP IBP:
I want to ensure that only the key figure “SAP REP QTY” is editable, while all other key figures are read-only.

I’ve noticed there are two options for this:

  1. Assigned Restriction Types in the “Maintain Business Roles” app:

    • Here, I can specify which key figures should be editable within a certain section.

       

  2. Permission Filters:

    • Alternatively, I can create a permission filter in which I define exactly which key figures are editable or non-editable.

My questions are:

  • How do these two settings work together?
  • When is it sufficient to use only “Assigned Restriction Types,” and when should I also define a “Permission Filter”?
  • Why do both options exist, and in which scenarios is each method typically used?

I appreciate any help, tips, or best practices on how to implement this cleanly. Thank you in advance!

Best regards,
Oliver

entry.title: Re: SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Subscription with BYOD plan
entry.content:
Great Blog !!!

Just few Questions:

1. What are the additional Benefits of BYOD over the current 'PaPM Run-Time DB' ?

2. Under a same tenant, can i have both 'PaPM Runtime DB' and 'BYOD' subscriptions?

3. Is there is any migration path available, to move existing developments from  'PaPM Run-Time DB' to BYOD ?

entry.title: Re: Off Cycle Increases through Performance-Compensation integrated worksheets
entry.content: It looks really nice, I ve set in in our demo and works perfectly. Just one thing - is it possible to set budget eg. for manager for whole year? If they use it for one employee and then launch form for second employee, there will be increased budget... I think, that it is not possible, but I want to ask 🙂 thanks, Monika

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Cloud or On-Premise? Not an “either or” option, but a str
entry.content:
Personally think this architectural decisions at SAP are horrendous. 

Now a lot of customers have to buy two solutions and its super confusing as we see here in the comment section. Licensing nightmare as usual with SAP.

Also customers who have been sold integration suite as the strategic integration platform for B2G are now being screwed over with the need to get another cloud subscription.  

Its not only DRC, SAP is doing this with other products as well.

entry.title: Re: Modify Scope in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Guru,

in order to add custom processes in your project, you have to add the scenario "Custom" in your scope. Please open the "Manage Scopes" Application. Then Select your existing Scope. Click on edit and add a further scenario called "Custom". Now you will be able to view your custom processes in your existing scope. 
Hope this helps.

Best regards,
Maya

entry.title: Re: Automatic E-Mail Alert when Exception in EWM MFS is fired
entry.content: If you are using SAP MFS you need the EWM Advanced Licence.  Due to my knowledge no separate license needed

entry.title: Re: issue with java script action in Build apps
entry.content: hi Dan, i found the issue where i'm going wrong, in the code i'm not passing it as inputs.input1 and also i didn't define the previous jsnode output as object .Thank you very much for the solution.

entry.title: Re: Are there any other transaction codes that have the s...
entry.content:
Hello @ThakurRavinderSingh 

The /SCWM/PRDVC transaction is a variant transaction that calls SM30 with the /SCWM/V_PRDV_C view:

 

The view links the /SCWM/TPRDV_CAT and /SCWM/TPRDV_CATT tables:

 

Both are of "application table" delivery class:

Therefore changes in /SCWM/PRDVC are not transportable.

 

Additionally the maintenance view generated for /SCWM/V_PRDV_C has the recording routine disabled:

 

I think you can safely remove the S_TRANSPRT authorization from the profile as transports are not required for /SCWM/PRDVC.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: New configuration Settlement Management in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Daniel,

After settlement, report WB2R_BVDETAIL will show  you the link between the rebate credit memo and the invoices which were used in the calculation of the rebate. This is the detailed statement of the settlement.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Automatic E-Mail Alert when Exception in EWM MFS is fired
entry.content:
Hi!

I'm not using MFS, I just need to trigger the email alert.

 

Thanks

Ksm

entry.title: Re: SAP PAPM Cloud SM integration with SAP cTMS
entry.content:
Really appreciate the effort on bring "Integration of SAP PaPM Cloud SM and SAP Cloud Transport Management (SAP cTMS)" feature , which is really very much essential from Audit and Traceability Purpose.

Does team have any plan to brining "integration with SAP cTMS" for SAP PaPM Cloud Universal Model as well?

entry.title: Re: issue with java script action in Build apps
entry.content: My pleasure 🙂

entry.title: Re: Inquiry regarding multiplex storage configuration
entry.content:
I share here answer provided by SAP IQ Support :

Basically SAP doesn't certify / test with the storage for a specific vendor.
If Veritas infoscale Storage works as same as NFS or GPFS on Linux,
IQ multiplex will also be able to work with the Veritas Storage.

I checked in past cases, but there is no customer case that IQ multiplex uses 
on Veritas infoscale Storage.
For Veritas Cluster Service, the below KBA exists:

2447953 - Is the Veritas Cluster Service required to manage IQ Multiplex? SAP IQ
3143339 - Install SYBASE IQ in multiplex in Unix cluster

entry.title: Re: Cloud identity service SCIM api to retrieve personal...
entry.content:
A usual business user does not have the authorization to invoke IAS APIs.
The personal data of a user is 'exposed' via the user profile page. Simply invoke the IAS tenant URL (e.g. https://xxxxx.accounts.ondemand) and then you end up on your user profile (after successful authentication).
In the top right corner of the profile page there is a button 'View My Data' and you'll get all your user profile data displayed.

entry.title: Product Updates for SAP Build Code – January 2025 Edition
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Welcome to the first SAP Build Code release communications blog post of the new year! We're excited to kick off 2025 with many great new features and enhancements designed to streamline your development experience.

Dive into our new Project Overview providing a streamlined and comprehensive view on your projects. We have also made several improvements to simplify your work with Remote Function Calls (RFC). Another notable addition is the inline editing capability for CDS entities, enabling you to add or edit properties directly in the CDS Graphical Modeler. In addition to these exciting new features, we have also curated a collection of informative blog posts that delve into various aspects related to SAP Build Code.

To explore these features in depth and stay ahead of the curve, check out the details of what's new!

 

The new Project Overview

In our latest release of SAP Build Code, we've introduced an exciting change to the default left pane view. We've switched from the Project Explorer to the new Project Overview. This new Project Overview layout aligns more closely with the Storyboard aesthetics and not only includes all the current functionalities of the Project Explorer but also offers additional capabilities.

As you can see in the screenshot below, the Project Overview presents the following sections: Data Models, Services, Analytical Models, User Interface, and External Resources.

Sections of the Project Overview

You can perform project level actions from the context menu of the project, create new objects of each type from the section ‘+’ action, and perform additional actions from the context menu on each object.


Performing Actions in the Project Overview

Moreover, we are thrilled to announce that in the future the Project Overview will support not just projects created via the SAP Build Code Lobby or those using the "full-stack with productivity tools" template, but it will also support full-stack applications built on SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) Java or CAP Node.js. Stay tuned for these upcoming enhancements, and we hope you enjoy the improved interface!

 

Improvements when Working with RFC

When you are working with Remote Function Calls (RFCs) in your Full-Stack Application Using Productivity Tools projects you should try out the following enhancement: When adding a Remote Function Call to a Full-Stack Application Using Productivity Tools project, the run configuration for the external resource is now updated automatically. You can use the run configuration to select which destination to use for RFC when previewing the full-stack application.

For Remote Function Calls, both basic authentication and now also principal propagation are supported, allowing you to explore services in the Service Center, preview apps via run configuration, and run deployed apps seamlessly without the hassle of entering user credentials. For further information, see Explore SAP System Functions.


Run Configuration: Functions (RFC)

 

Inline Editing for CDS Entities

We are thrilled to announce the launch of our new inline editing feature in the CDS Graphical Modeler! This enhancement allows users to add or edit properties directly within an entity in the diagram shown in the CDS Graphical Modeler. This means fewer clicks, less navigating and a more intuitive experience. This addition complements the existing property sheet functionality and will make your work smoother and faster.


Adding a new property

 

Deprecation of Java Tools in SAP Web IDE

We'd like to inform you of important updates affecting SAP Web IDE: SAP Web IDE sunset will take place as part of the sunset of the SAP BTP, Neo environment by December 31, 2028. As a successor of SAP Web IDE, SAP introduced the SAP Business Application Studio five years ago, which has been serving as a robust and modernized alternative for development needs.

Furthermore, we'd like address the recent announcement regarding the deprecation of the SAP Java Buildpack 1. This component is set to be deprecated from the SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment by June 2025. Consequently, Java tools currently supported in SAP Web IDE will also be phased out by the same date in June 2025.

For a more detailed examination of these changes, how it may affect your development process, and guidance on migrating to the recommended environments, please read Liat Borenstein’s comprehensive article: Deprecation of Java Tools in SAP Web IDE.

 

Further readings

  • Overview of GenAI in SAP Build and SAP Build Code 

Since its initial release in March 2024, SAP Build Code has rapidly evolved to bring cutting-edge generative AI (GenAI) functionalities to developers across diverse use cases. The latest blog post of my colleagues David Bizer and Marc Huber delves into the current features of SAP Build Code and the wide array of use cases they support. They also provide recommendations tailored to specific functionalities to ensure you get the most out of this powerful tool.

If you are interested in an overview on generative AI in SAP Build, you shouldn’t miss this blog post written by my colleague Marc Huber: AI in SAP Build - Overview and Best Practices.

  • Multi-Agent Support for Advanced CAP Application Generation

Streamline your development process by using the new feature for multi-agent support for advanced CAP application generation with SAP Build Code Joule. The key: harness specialized agents for various tasks using just a single prompt. In his latest blog post, Xin Ye explains this new feature in detail by guiding through an end-to-end flow.

  • Migrating SAPUI5 Applications to TypeScript with the Help of Joule 

As you probably know, Joule supports you with writing freestyle SAPUI5 code in SAP Build Code. Joule's latest feature offers an AI-driven migration of UI5 applications to TypeScript, which, compared to JavaScript, enables an improved development efficiency. This blog post, written by Martin Haeuser is dedicated to providing insights into the latest feature that offers AI-driven migration of SAPUI5 applications to TypeScript.

  • Differences between Extension Projects and Adaptation Projects in SAPUI5 

Looking to enhance your SAPUI5 applications? The blog post "Extending SAPUI5 apps: Adaptation projects vs. Extension projects" written by my colleague Oliver Graeff, explores the flexibility of SAPUI5, which allows not just developers but also key users and end users to extend standard apps. Discover how developers harness the power of adaptation projects in SAP Business Application Studio, the development environment of SAP Build Code. While adaptation projects offer advanced, strategic solutions for code-based extensions, there are also the predecessor extension projects. To address frequent confusions, Oliver explains the differences between the two of them.

  • Deprecation of the karma-ui5 Plugin 

SAPUI5 provides many testing options, like unit and integration tests, which are summarized in UI5 Testing. As the Karma test runner is deprecated since April 2023, the UI5 team now also has to deprecate karma-ui5. For further details, please read the following blog post from Oliver Graeff:  Deprecation of karma-ui5 plugin.

  • SAP Fiori tools 2501 Update 

SAP Fiori tools is consistently evolving, bringing innovative features that empower both experienced developers and casual users. The recent updates focus on harnessing AI, simplifying the user interface for adaptations, and enhancing the overall usability of the tools. Read this blog post written by Christoph Gollmick and discover how these new enhancements can elevate your SAP Fiori development journey.

  • SAP HANA SQL Notebooks in SAP Build, SAP Business Application Studio and Visual Studio Code

With SQL Notebooks you can incorporate SQL statements into your projects. It offers effortless access to your underlying SAP HANA database or HDI Container but also includes scripts for setup, adding test data, and delivering educational functions. In this blog post, Volker Saggau provides a comprehensive overview of SAP HANA SQL Notebooks in various environments such as SAP Build, SAP Business Application Studio, and Visual Studio Code.

 

For further information on new features, please check our roadmaps: roadmap for SAP Build Code, SAPUI5 Road Map. And have a look at What's New in SAP Build Code, the What's New Viewer for SAPUI5 and the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model Release Notes. If you want to stay up-to-date with news, learning resources, and product and strategy updates for SAP Build Code: follow our tag.

We look forward to seeing how you use these new capabilities to create innovative solutions and drive your projects forward. Stay tuned for more updates and happy coding! 😊

entry.title: Re: Disabling the Mobile App for Multiple Profiles
entry.content:
Hi naveenkumar22,

thank for your reply.

So this feature can not be controled from Admin Center in he SuccessFactors?

entry.title: Re: AZT_TM_adhoc Report deprecation date confirmation
entry.content:
In the past SAP has announced to deprecate the legacy reporting tools (table reports, canvas, tiles). While tile reports and dashboards will end with H2 2025, the deprecation announcement for table reports have been withdrawn. Please details here:

Deprecation of Table Reports | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: How to get the username in error 06 307 Info record &...
entry.content:
Hello @biluka_evcwnbrg 

The 06307 is not and can't be customizable. It tells that there is a locking conflict when accessing a purchasing info record in the change mode.

Unfortunately, SAP has implemented the message that it doesn't show a blocking user id. That can't be changed without modifying SAP standard code.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to construct cXML for Ariba in SAP Process Automation
entry.content:
We need to post a commerce XML with the data extracted to Ariba Solutions.  Is there any elegant way to do this and has it been done before.  I used a simple string concatenation and used the string for the body and it is a pain to give escape characters.

return {
    'method' : 'POST',
    'headers': {'Accept' : '*/*',
                'Accept-Encoding' : 'gzip, deflate, br',
                'Connection': 'keep-alive',
                'Content-Type' : 'multipart/related;type="application/xml";start="<mimepart1>";boundary="----=_Part_XERRR_XDDFFDDFF"'
               },
    'url'    : url,
    'body'   : cxmlString,
    'responseType' : 'text',
    'resolveBodyOnly' :true
};

entry.title: Re: Communicate from SAP Public Cloud to Java Application...
entry.content: The problem is currently jco.server.use_tls=0, this is actually not supported from ABAP cloud clients, they will always communicate via TLS, however your current JCo server expects plain WebSocket communication now with this setting. For testing purposes you can create and setup a simple p12 file containing an own server certificate which ABAP trusts.

entry.title: Re: The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at the destination
entry.content:
Hi Kiranmayee,

Have you resolved this issue? I have the same issue at the moment.

Thanks,
Jhani

entry.title: RFC destination not showing up in destinations in Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi all, i created a RFC Destination in BTP cockpit, while checking the Connection ,it's showing as Connection Successful.

But this destination is not showing up in Build apps, under Integration Tab.
Not getting where i'm going wrong. Can anyone please help .
Thank you in Advance.

@Dan_Wroblewski  @DonWilliams @Sandra_Rossi @Ulrich_Schmidt

entry.title: HR Connectivity in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
In the rapidly evolving landscape of digital business operations, compliance and data management are paramount. Recognizing the challenges organizations face, SAP has introduced two significant innovations in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502, specifically targeting HR connectivity and data protection. In this blog post, I am excited to share deeper insights into how the latest innovations can help your organization.

 

Workforce: Assignment of Data Controllers

With data privacy regulations such as GDPR shaping business operations, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 streamlines compliance through an advanced data protection model. This release integrates privacy principles directly into the data management framework, ensuring that the handling of workforce data is in line with global data protection laws.

Key Features:

  • Integrated Data Controller Logic: By linking worker data to relevant data controllers, the innovation reduces manual effort in data assignment and ensures a robust data separation model. This integrated logic not only minimizes exposure to data-related risks but also streamlines compliance processes.
  • Access Restrictions: Ensures sensitive worker data is accessible only to authorized personnel, safeguarding personal information through role-based access controls.
  • Automatic Data Controller Assignments: Enhances operational efficiency by automatically assigning data controllers to workers, aligning with legal entities and simplifying joint controllership management.

The innovation is designed to empower organizations to effectively manage privacy risks by integrating advanced data protection measures directly into the cloud infrastructure. This strategic enhancement not only safeguards sensitive information but also significantly reduces the need for manual interventions regarding data controller assignments. By doing so, it ensures a smooth, seamless operation that upholds compliance standards with minimal effort, thereby increasing overall operational efficiency. This dual focus on risk mitigation and streamlined processes positions the innovation as a vital asset for organizations seeking to navigate the complexities of data privacy in today's digital landscape.

 

SAP Fiori App “Worker Overview”: Overview Tab

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 brings a new overview tab in the SAP Fiori “Worker Overview” app for HR professionals and managers. This tab serves as an intuitive and centralized dashboard, designed to present all critical worker data in one streamlined screen. 

Key Features:

  • Centralized Dashboard: Offers a holistic view of each worker by integrating contact details, employment agreements, organizational structure, and personnel data. This ensures that managers and HR professionals can make faster, more informed decisions.
  • Real-Time Data: Provides accuracy in decision-making by displaying up-to-date data, reducing the time wasted searching across multiple systems or screens.
  • Intuitive Navigation: SAP Fiori's clean design ensures that navigating through worker information is seamless, enhancing user experience across all roles.

 The latest innovation brings notable advancements in efficiency and communication, designed to optimize organizational workflows. With rapid access to comprehensive worker information, professionals can save valuable time and effort, empowering timely and well-informed decision-making. This heightened efficiency ensures that critical actions are based on accurate and up-to-date data. Additionally, streamlined access to manager and supplier details simplifies communication pathways, enhancing coordination both within the organization and with external partners. This dual focus on efficiency and communication not only strengthens internal operations but also fosters better collaboration across the board, promoting a more cohesive and agile organizational environment.

 

These innovations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 strongly position the platform as a leader in privacy by design, offering organizations the tools they need to stay compliant and operate efficiently in today's challenging data privacy environment. SAP continues to empower its users by refining business management processes and ensuring that data remains secure, accessible, and optimally managed. 

 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!   

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime.  

  

🔎Find All of Our Assets   

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Re: where to find log for portal runtime error

entry.title: Re: HTTP Call working in ECC but not working in S4

entry.title: Re: Where to find Runtime error log file?

entry.title: Re: Announcing the New "In-Metro" Disaster Recovery Solution for SAP BTP
entry.content:
Yes, @gergo_timar this is currently within a given region and not (yet) inbetween regions:
"deploying services across multiple availability zones within a single region.."

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for EHS-IM - Search for user retrieves us...
entry.content:
Dear Paulo,

the reason for this extra letter "D" in the username is used by EHS internally to handle different types of natural or legal persons. Whenever we store information about a person or organization, there are different objects which are used to represent this persons and/or organizations:

  • HR Persons (from HCM, see t-code PA20). For any of these, we add the letter "A" internally. As an example, an employee might have the number 2901, which will get stored internally in EHS as A00002901.
  • Applicants (from HCM). For any of these, we add the letter "B" internally.
  • External Parties (Business Partners), used for both, persons and organizations, we add the letter "C" internally. 
  • System Users (see t-code SU01D). For any of these, we add the letter "D" internally. If a user is picked as a responsible person at a location level with the "normal" username MFECKER, it's internally stored as DMFECKER.

Of course, these different objects can be connected, e.g. connecting the HR Person by infotype 0105/0001 with the system user. In such a case, we internally choose the most "useful" representation. Assuming you have a HR Person connected to a System User, it's obviously the HR Person. For an S/4HANA business user (which is the connected HR Person, System User, and Business Partner), it's the HR Person representation with some tweaks.

With this generic approach, we can store different kinds/types of people or organizations in a single field. Of course, in some places, we MUST look for a user - especially if there is a workflow in the system involved. This is the case for the "Responsible Persons" at a location level. These are used to be the responsible persons for the workflows for EHS Incident Management, EHS Chemical Data Management, and EHS Environment Management.

The issue with the error message "DUsername does not exist" is usually caused by a system copy. As an example, on a production system, there might be users which do not exist on a development box. After the system copy the users might get deleted on the copied instance, causing the problem.

In your search for responsible persons, the DUsernames should not show up - if these are not existing. First, I would ask you to check if the business users are correctly set up. Then, you might raise a support ticket to SAP.

With kind regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: HTTP Call working in ECC but not working in S4
entry.content: Hi @Sandra_Rossui

entry.title: Re: How to Implement "Navigate to List on Save" in a Fiori Elements App with OData V4
entry.content:
I couldn't find anything in the documentation for oData v4. You can try this as a workaround in your controllerExtensions for the object page. 

onAfterSave: function(mParameters) {
    this.base.getExtensionAPI().routing.navigateToRoute("list_view_name_here");
},

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello community!

I am so happy to join this group.

entry.title: Re: Automatic E-Mail Alert when Exception in EWM MFS is fired
entry.content: I don't think so. Normal SOST/SCOT Handling

entry.title: Re: CSP Error in UI API Extension in SAP B1 Webclient
entry.content: Yes we are facing this issue, any one can help??

entry.title: WBS creation using CNMASSCREATE executing error
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am trying to create Mass WBS by using CNMASSCREATE but while executing Getting error " Error in individual BAPIs or precommit: posting not possible. Hence, project and it's wbs elements could not be created". How to resolve it. please help.

@SAPPS @SAPPS

entry.title: Re: Career Site Builder Unified Data Model: New Job Search, Layout and Design
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,
We had created the new Job Location however this has now brought in two location fields in job requisition. Its not a very convenient thing for users who already have location_obj and now they have all new field to work upon . We had tried the integration center job as well which does not seems to be working either.
Has anyone got a chance to create a job to automate location_obj to jobLocation (New field) through integration center job . Any assistance would be really appreciated , because we do not want manual updating of the field.
Business rules not working as well the position to req mapping is not working for location_obj to jobLocation. SAP documentations are not great either on this
